Description:
  Welcome to use dry cli, a tool to help you generate source code!

Usage:
  dry [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  dto <entity path>          generate entity dto files
  manager <entity path>      generate dtos, datastore, manager
  api, webapi <entity path>  generate dtos, managers and RestfulApi controllers
  angular, ng <Url or Path>  generate angular request service and interface from OpenAPI json
  request <Url or Path>      generate request service and interface from OpenAPI json
  studio                     studio management
  client <Url or Path>       generate csharp request   client from OpenAPI json

Description:
  generate dtos, managers and RestfulApi controllers

Usage:
  dry webapi <entity path> [options]

Arguments:
  <entity path>  The entity file path

Options:
  -d, --dto <dto>          dto project director [default: src/Definition/Share]
  -m, --manager <manager>  manager and datastore project directory [default: src/Application]
  -o, --output <output>    api controller project directory [default: src/Http.API]
  -f, --force              force overwrite file [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
